title: alnus × pubescens
intro: Alnus × pubescens, also known as the green alder or alder buckthorn, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the alder family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of alder buckthorn include its potential to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, while also exhibiting antibacterial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the alder buckthorn are often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
